name: @pryzm/plugin-bcf
description: PRYZM 2 — BCF (BIM Collaboration Format) round-trip plugin (Phase 3-B Sprint S57). Reads + writes BCF 3.0 ZIP archives (markup.bcf XML + viewpoint.bcfv per topic folder + project.bcfp). Deterministic byte-stable write per spec. Per PHASE-3B-Q2-M28-M30-PLUGINS-IFC-DXF-RHINO.md §S57.
